ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "release_date" INTEGER /* Year the game was released */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* Platforms the game is available on (e.g., PC, console, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notations" (
  "notation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the notation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the notation */,
  "notation_type" TEXT /* Type of notation (e.g., tag, label, rating) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_mods" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "mod_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mod */,
  "compatibility_status" TEXT /* Compatibility status of the mod with the game (e.g., compatible, incompatible, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "mod_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_notations" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "notation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notation */,
  "notation_value" TEXT /* Value of the notation for the game (e.g., a rating or a label) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "notation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the content */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the content belongs to */,
  "mod_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mod the content belongs to */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the content was uploaded */,
  "upload_type" TEXT /* Type of upload (e.g., mod, customization, review) */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility status of the upload (e.g., public, private, hidden) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* ID of the upload the review belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_upload_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_id") REFERENCES uploads ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* ID of the upload the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the mod or customization */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Change log for the version (e.g., bug fixes, new features) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_upload_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_id") REFERENCES uploads ("upload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mod_downloads" (
  "mod_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mod */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the mod has been downloaded */,
  "last_download_date" TEXT /* Date of the last download */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mod_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mod_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "mod_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mod the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mod_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
